info.name: Retrieves all contacts in a Xero organisation

params.name: IDs
params.description: Filter by a comma separated list of ContactIDs. Allows you to retrieve a specific set of contacts in a single call.

params.name: page
params.description: e.g. page=1 - Up to 100 contacts will be returned in a single API call.

params.name: includeArchived
params.description: e.g. includeArchived=true - Contacts with a status of ARCHIVED will be included in the response

params.name: summaryOnly
params.description: Use summaryOnly=true in GET Contacts and Invoices endpoint to retrieve a smaller version of the response object. This returns only lightweight fields, excluding computation-heavy fields from the response, making the API calls quick and efficient.

params.name: searchTerm
params.description: Search parameter that performs a case-insensitive text search across the Name, FirstName, LastName, ContactNumber and EmailAddress fields.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Number of records to retrieve per page

items.docs: Retrieves all contacts in a Xero organisation

info.name: Xero Retrieves sales invoices or purchase bills

params.name: IDs
params.description: Filter by a comma-separated list of InvoicesIDs.

params.name: InvoiceNumbers
params.description: Filter by a comma-separated list of InvoiceNumbers.

params.name: ContactIDs
params.description: Filter by a comma-separated list of ContactIDs.

params.name: Statuses
params.description: Filter by a comma-separated list Statuses. For faster response times we recommend using these explicit parameters instead of passing OR conditions into the Where filter.

params.name: page
params.description: e.g. page=1 – Up to 100 invoices will be returned in a single API call with line items shown for each invoice

params.name: includeArchived
params.description: e.g. includeArchived=true - Invoices with a status of ARCHIVED will be included in the response

params.name: createdByMyApp
params.description: When set to true you'll only retrieve Invoices created by your app

params.name: unitdp
params.description: e.g. unitdp=4 – (Unit Decimal Places) You can opt in to use four decimal places for unit amounts

params.name: summaryOnly
params.description: Use summaryOnly=true in GET Contacts and Invoices endpoint to retrieve a smaller version of the response object. This returns only lightweight fields, excluding computation-heavy fields from the response, making the API calls quick and efficient.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Number of records to retrieve per page

params.name: searchTerm
params.description: Search parameter that performs a case-insensitive text search across the fields e.g. InvoiceNumber, Reference.

items.docs: Xero Retrieves sales invoices or purchase bills

info.name: Xero Retrieves linked transactions (billable expenses)

params.name: page
params.description: Up to 100 linked transactions will be returned in a single API call. Use the page parameter to specify the page to be returned e.g. page=1.

params.name: LinkedTransactionID
params.description: The Xero identifier for an Linked Transaction

params.name: SourceTransactionID
params.description: Filter by the SourceTransactionID. Get the linked transactions created from a particular ACCPAY invoice

params.name: ContactID
params.description: Filter by the ContactID. Get all the linked transactions that have been assigned to a particular customer.

params.name: Status
params.description: Filter by the combination of ContactID and Status. Get  the linked transactions associated to a  customer and with a status

params.name: TargetTransactionID
params.description: Filter by the TargetTransactionID. Get all the linked transactions allocated to a particular ACCREC invoice

info.name: Xero Retrieves purchase orders

params.name: DateFrom
params.description: Filter by purchase order date (e.g. GET https://.../PurchaseOrders?DateFrom=2015-12-01&DateTo=2015-12-31

params.name: DateTo
params.description: Filter by purchase order date (e.g. GET https://.../PurchaseOrders?DateFrom=2015-12-01&DateTo=2015-12-31

params.name: page
params.description: To specify a page, append the page parameter to the URL e.g. ?page=1. If there are 100 records in the response you will need to check if there is any more data by fetching the next page e.g ?page=2 and continuing this process until no more results are returned.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Number of records to retrieve per page

params.description: Filter for quotes before a particular date

params.description: Filter for quotes belonging to a particular contact

params.name: Status
params.description: Filter for quotes of a particular Status

params.description: e.g. page=1 – Up to 100 Quotes will be returned in a single API call with line items shown for each quote
